summary: Stunningly clear audience tape that captures a hot Garcia performance with an electrifying Playing in the Band > Crazy Fingers sequence.
review: The three reviewers rave about this July‑2‑1989 show, highlighting Jerry’s “hot” playing and the rare Playin → Crazy Fingers opening that later resurfaced as a reprise. The audience recording is described as crystal‑clear (with only a slight treble cut needed), making it one of the best AUD sources they’ve heard. Overall the performance flows tightly with standout jams and enthusiastic crowd interaction.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are positive (average 4.33★), praising both the musical performance and the audio clarity; with only three detailed comments confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Stunningly clear with a slight treble cut needed; captures ambience well and is regarded as possibly the best audience (AUD) recording the reviewer has heard.

standout_songs: Playing in the Band > Crazy Fingers (reprise)
show_quality.setlist_flow: The set opens with a bold Playing in the Band → Crazy Fingers, returns to that theme later as a reprise, and maintains strong momentum through the jams; the band is described as flowing together tightly.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia is described as "hot" and opens the set with a friendly greeting, contributing greatly to the show's energy.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent played an unusual instrument during the jam and his keyboard work (Eyes, Prophet, Fantasy, Juse) was noted as smoking.
